name: cyberpunk_terminal
description: Cyan terminal glyph with glow on a magenta-purple gradient + subtle grid — cyberpunk vibe. Tests glow + texture composition.

expect.qualitative: Deep navy (#0F0F23) → hot magenta (#FF006E) gradient with subtle grid texture at ~25% opacity, electric cyan (#00F5FF) terminal glyph with strong outer glow. The glow must be perceptible at 512px.
